method: deterministic m.logits(chunk,0)[:,-1,:] argmax+sum+max, default vs pipe @ctx512
note: m.forward returns a GUMBEL-sampled token (rand_like noise even at temp=0); its [1,1] fingerprint diverged (198 vs 151936) as SAMPLING noise, NOT a logit difference. The deterministic m.logits are byte-identical -> output-equivalent.
